heading: Assistance for governmental entities and private entities in recognizing online violent extremist content
label: 3368 Assistance for governmental entities and private entities in recognizing online violent extremist content
notes: Amendments2023—Subsec. (b). substituted “until ” for “or more frequently as needed”.Pub. L. 118–31December 22, 2023
amendments: Amendments2023—Subsec. (b). substituted “until ” for “or more frequently as needed”.Pub. L. 118–31December 22, 2023

children.heading: Assistance to recognize online violent extremist content
children.label: a Assistance to recognize online violent extremist content
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , and consistent with the protection of intelligence sources and methods, the Director of National Intelligence shall publish on a publicly available Internet website a list of all logos, symbols, insignia, and other markings commonly associated with, or adopted by, an organization designated by the Secretary of State as a foreign terrorist organization under .May 5, 2017section 1189(a) of title 8

children.heading: Updates
children.label: b Updates
children.text: The Director shall update the list published under subsection (a) every 180 days until .December 22, 2023
